1 OR 35
0 OR 24

Matched
0 OR 24
1 OR 35
2 OR 46
3 OR 57
4 I 6
5 I 7
6 I 0
7 I 1

Applying to 11000110
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 OR 24 = OR(I 2,I 4) = OR(0,0) = 0
1 OR 35 = OR(I 3,I 5) = OR(0,1) = 1
2 OR 46 = OR(I 4,I 6) = OR(0,1) = 1
3 OR 57 = OR(I 5,I 7) = OR(1,0) = 1
4 I 6 = 1
5 I 7 = 0
6 I 0 = 1
7 I 1 = 1

\boxed{01111011}
